title: $LICENSE_OPTIONS
text: $LICENSE_OPTIONS Set one or more license management options, according to your Sentinel license type. $LICENSE_OPTIONS { = } Option { , Option } n where Option is one of: LM_LICENSE_FILE = LicenseServers | LicenseFile | CloudConfigFile | LicenseDir LM_NOTIFICATION = NumberOfDays LM_TRANSCRIPT = NumberOfDays LM_LOGFILE = NumberOfDays | true | false LM_RENEWAL_NOTIFICATION = NumberOfDays LM_MAINTENANCE_NOTIFICATION = NumberOfDays LM_NOTIFICATION_POSTMESSAGE LM_LOAD = { S | sentinel | snt } | { C } { R } { G } { 9 | 10 } LM_UPGRADE_NOTIFICATION = NumberOfDays LM_COMMUTER_NOTIFICATION = NumberOfDays LM_TIMEOUT = Seconds LM_REDUNDANT Defaults Items Value Assignment file Application assignment files Section [SETTINGS] Default value None Description Uniface makes use of the Sentinel Rights Management System (RMS) to manage licensing. For more information, see Uniface License Management . For existing Uniface Enterprise Edition users, it is still possible to use the Uniface Distributed License Manager (DLM) up to version 10.3.03. If no Sentinel options are selected, DLM is used by default. For DLM license configuration, see $LICENSE_OPTIONS (DLM). LM_NOTIFICATION , LM_RENEWAL_NOTIFICATION , LM_MAINTENANCE_NOTIFICATION , LM_UPGRADE_NOTIFICATION , LM_COMMUTER_NOTIFICATION , and LM_NOTIFICATION_POSTMESSAGE settings overrides LM_TRANSCRIPT and LM_LOGFILE settings if they are set to a lower value.
